---
title: "server.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/node/gateway/server.ts"
loc: 35
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.77
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 6.41
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)

## ⛩️ API Gateways
- `[GET] /health`


## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fastify)
- [*](file://@fastify/cors)
- [TypeBoxTypeProvider](file://@fastify/type-provider-typebox)
- [*](file://./plugins/corvus.js)
- [*](file://./routes/api/intent.js)
- [*](file://./routes/streams/telemetry.js)

### Exports
- `fastify`
- `start`
- `PORT`
